title: Care Bundles & Gaps
description: Care Bundles group clinical quality measures (care gaps) targeting a specific patient population. Evaluating a bundle identifies which patients are out-of-compliance with each measure, enabling population health management and quality improvement workflows.
tips: Select a data source, then use 'New Bundle' to create a disease-specific care bundle grouping related quality measures.
The Disease Bundles tab lists all care bundles. Each bundle contains measures with denominator (eligible) and numerator (compliant) cohort definitions.
Gap rate = 1 minus (numerator count / denominator count). A lower gap rate means better compliance.
The Population Overview tab provides aggregate compliance metrics across all bundles for the selected source.
Overlap rules detect patients with conflicting or redundant measure assignments across bundles.
Evaluation results can be exported to drive clinical outreach workflows and measure improvement over time.
